AUTH.SIGNIN_DETAILS: Sign in to stay connected with your institution
AUTH.SIGNUP_DETAILS: Enter your details to start your educational journey with EduFlow
AUTH.PASSWORD_RULES: At least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter, a digit, and a special character.
AUTH.NO_PLUS_IN_EMAIL: Plus signs are not allowed in the email address.
AUTH.FORGOT_SUBTITLE: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a reset code.
AUTH.RESET_NEUTRAL_HINT: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a 6-digit code shortly.
AUTH.RESET_DONE_HINT: You can now sign in with your new password.
AUTH.ERR_BLOCKED: This account has been blocked. Please contact an administrator.
AUTH.ERR_EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.

ERRORS.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address
ERRORS.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
ERRORS.GENERIC: An error occurred. Please try again.
ERRORS.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to view this page
ERRORS.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.

LANDING.HERO_TITLE: Learn, move forward, and stay connected to your institution
LANDING.HERO_SUBTITLE: Find your courses, deadlines, and results in a simple, clear, and professional experience.
LANDING.HERO_BADGE: The platform that supports every learning journey
LANDING.HERO_POINT_PERSONALIZED: A personal space with your courses and priorities
LANDING.HERO_POINT_TRACKING: Clear reminders to stay on track without stress
LANDING.HERO_POINT_COLLAB: Shared follow-up across students, teachers, and academic teams
LANDING.PROOF_SPEED: faster to find the right information
LANDING.PROOF_ONBOARDING: to feel at home in the platform
LANDING.FLOATING_CARD_HINT: Steady progress with clear goals in sight.
LANDING.VIDEO_CARD_SUBTITLE: Your next live class starts in 35 minutes.
LANDING.TRUST_LABEL: Trusted by schools, institutes, and training centres
LANDING.STATS_TITLE: An experience designed for confident learning
LANDING.STATS_SUBTITLE: Every screen helps the user understand where they are, what matters now, and how to move forward.
LANDING.FEATURES_SUBTITLE: A clear platform to learn, track results, and stay connected to your institution
LANDING.FEATURE_ANALYTICS_DESC: See your progress, recent activity, and the next important steps at a glance.
LANDING.FEATURE_AI_DESC: Receive helpful recommendations to keep pace and avoid falling behind.
LANDING.FEATURE_MULTILANG_DESC: A smooth experience in French, English, and Arabic, on mobile and desktop.
LANDING.FEATURE_EXPERIENCE_DESC: Everything is organised so you can quickly find a course, a grade, or useful information.
LANDING.FEATURE_STORY_TITLE: A clear experience for students and a reassuring one for institutions
LANDING.FEATURE_STORY_SUBTITLE: Users find the right content at the right time while academic teams keep a simple overview.
LANDING.STORY_ONE_DESC: Courses, assignments, and important reminders stay within reach in seconds.
LANDING.STORY_TWO_DESC: Teachers and academic teams can follow engagement without unnecessary complexity.
LANDING.STORY_THREE_DESC: Messages, resources, and useful alerts arrive at the right moment.
LANDING.JOURNEY_TITLE: Everything is designed to help you move forward smoothly
LANDING.JOURNEY_SUBTITLE: From sign-in to results, every step provides a clear and reassuring view of your progress.
LANDING.STEP_PLAN_DESC: Access your space quickly from any device.
LANDING.STEP_GUIDE_DESC: Spot your priorities, reminders, and upcoming classes right away.
LANDING.STEP_GROW_DESC: Review your grades, progress, and the next opportunities to improve.
LANDING.TIMELINE_ITEM_ONE_DESC: Return to your personal space the moment you open the platform.
LANDING.TIMELINE_ITEM_TWO_DESC: Lessons, assignments, and useful information stay visible.
LANDING.TIMELINE_ITEM_THREE_DESC: Progress, grades, and important messages are grouped in one place.
LANDING.CTA_TITLE: Ready to join your learning space?
LANDING.CTA_SUBTITLE: Sign in or create your account to get started in moments.
